title: nextjs-chatbot
description: A Next.js chat app wired to a Kuralle agent — streaming UI, thread history, and Postgres-ready persistence.

title: restaurant-order
description: An order-taking agent built with Kuralle flows — branching menu (pizza/sushi), confirmation loop, and order placement. Ported from Pipecat.

title: campus-bot
description: University student-relationship assistant — triage across academic advising, financial aid, and wellbeing specialists.

title: cedar-health
description: Multi-specialty clinic patient assistant — identity verification before any patient-specific tool, scheduling + triage.

title: chief-of-staff
description: Chief-of-staff agent for one leader — strategic comms, pre-meeting briefs, and commitment tracking.

title: hearth-bot
description: B2C meal-kit subscription support — per-specialist tool scoping (retention vs box-issue vs general).

title: knowledge-worker
description: Personal AI for a knowledge worker — triage to researcher / drafter / summarizer specialists over Notion + Linear.

title: ops-bot
description: Internal IT/HR operations bot — a single agent over Okta / Notion / Linear tools.
